case_title: WILLIAMS, ARNELLA VS FRANKLIN CAPITAL CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, ARNELLA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANKLIN CAPITAL CORPORATION $536.04 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $556.04, PLAINTIFF WILL PROVIDE DEFENDANT WRITTEN PROFF OF INSURANCE FROM 1996 TO PRESENT; UPON PROOF OF INS.
